prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response: Verily, 'tis said that the quarterly harvest of Golden Coins didst surpass expectations, with the Golden Sheep generating 23% more fleece than in the previous quarter. Alas, the armies of Marketing didst falter in their quest to vanquish the Moat of Customer Acquisition Cost. 'Tis rumored that wise prophets hath foretold a doubling of revenue amongst the tribe of Enterprise Customers by the coming of the Q2 dawn. Meanwhile, many a stout yeoman amongst the Sales Legions hath reported a bountiful productive capacity of 140%, thus doth the mystic economies of Business continue to confound and enthrall.
